steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
For similar triangles, the ratio of corresponding side lengths equals the ratio of the perimeters. The perimeters are $37$ and $333$, so
$$\frac{333}{37}=9$$

steps.title: Scale the corresponding side
steps.content:
Side $TU$ corresponds to side $XY$, and $TU=18$. Multiply by the scale factor:
$$XY=18\cdot 9=162$$
The answer is D.
